title: pfeiffera micrantha
intro: Pfeiffera micrantha, also known as the Dwarf Pfeiffera, is a small, flowering plant native to New Caledonia. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Pfeiffera micrantha has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, making it a potential treatment for wounds and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a tincture or infused oil, which can be applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
